name: Easter Eggs & Hidden Details
description: Hidden references, foreshadowing, and easter eggs that most people walked right past. Detective-like discovery tone where each detail revealed is more mind-blowing than the last. Makes viewers want to immediately revisit the source.

structure.hook_rule: Open with the most MIND-BLOWING hidden detail — the one that recontextualizes everything: 'There's a detail in [topic] that 99% of people walked right past. And once you see it, you can NEVER unsee it.' Make it sound like you discovered something the creators tried to hide in plain sight.
structure.pacing_rule: Each detail is a DISCOVERY. Use discovery language: 'Look closely at...', 'If you pause right here...', 'Notice how [X] appears in BOTH scenes...', 'The creator actually hid...'. Start with easy-to-spot details (viewers feel smart), escalate to frame-by-frame analysis details (viewers feel like experts). 4-6 easter eggs, each with a clear 'reveal' moment.
structure.ending_rule: End with a detail that RECONTEXTUALIZES everything viewers thought they knew: 'And this one detail changes the meaning of the ENTIRE [topic].' Then hint there are even more: 'And I haven't even gotten to what's hidden in [specific scene/chapter]...' Loop back to the opening.
structure.tone: Excited detective who just cracked a cold case. Sharing discoveries with fellow obsessives who will appreciate the depth. Think 'you're NOT going to believe what I found.'
transitions_en: And if you look even closer...
But THIS detail is what really shocked me...
transitions_vi: Nhưng đó mới chỉ là khởi đầu...
Và nếu bạn nhìn kỹ hơn...
Nhưng chi tiết này mới thực sự gây sốc...
Bạn đã bao giờ để ý...

prompt_injection: FORMAT: Easter egg reveal chain with escalating discovery. Structure: IMPOSSIBLE-TO-IGNORE HOOK → Easy Detail (viewer validation) → Medium Detail (surprising connection) → Hard Detail (frame-by-frame level) → GAME-CHANGER Detail (recontextualizes everything) → 'There's more' closer. Every detail must feel like a real-time discovery. Use phrases like 'If you look closely...', 'What most people miss is...', 'The creator actually hid...', 'And THIS connects to...'. The viewer should want to immediately go back and rewatch/revisit the source material. Never just describe — REVEAL. Minimum 200 words.
example_hook_en: There's a hidden detail in [topic] that changes EVERYTHING. And almost nobody caught it.
example_hook_vi: Có một chi tiết ẩn trong [topic] thay đổi TẤT CẢ. Và gần như không ai phát hiện ra.
